seoTitle: Forbes vs Forge Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Forbes and Forge Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Forbes vs Forge Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Forbes and Forge Creek.
heading: Forbes vs Forge Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Forbes, Victoria and Forge Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Forge Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Forbes (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Forbes or Forge Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Forbes has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Forge Creek scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Forbes scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Forge Creek scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Forbes or Forge Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Forge Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
